description: The De Stefano 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Reggio Calabria, Italy. It rose to prominence in the 1970s after the first 'Ndrangheta war, taking control of construction and drug trafficking. The clan has strong ramifications throughout Italy, particularly in Lombardy, Tuscany, Emilia-Romagna, and Liguria. Several members have been listed among Italy's most wanted fugitives.
